detector.inline: (profile.code_domains.includes('query') || profile.code_domains.includes('deterministic') || profile.repo_signals.some(s => /\b(how many (rows|records|entries|files|items)|count (the )?(rows|records|entries|matching)|list (the )?(files|tables|columns|rows|records|entries)|select .* from|read-only query|inspect (the )?(state|config|schema|database)|show (the )?(schema|table|rows|status|diff|config value)|git (status|diff)|explain (analyze|the query|plan))\b|查询|统计.*(条|行|个)|列出.*(文件|表|记录)|读取.*(配置|状态)|有多少(条|行|个)/i.test(s))) && !profile.repo_signals.some(s => /\b(fix|implement|edit|modify|delete|deploy|migrate|migration|backfill|insert|update|alter|drop|setup|bootstrap)\b|修复|实现|修改|删除|部署|迁移|写入/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
